description_long: This object consists of a group of five glass bottles, each with a classic long-necked shape and a narrow mouth. Three of the bottles have visible labels with distinct branding and text, while two are plain, one green and one brown. The labeled bottles feature colorful designs, including gold, red, and white elements, and are likely intended to represent beer or soda bottles. The glass surfaces appear smooth and slightly glossy, with the green and brown colors being the most prominent. The bottles are empty, as no liquid is visible inside, and there are no signs of damage or deformation. The tops of the bottles are capped with what appears to be a standard crown cap, typical for beverage bottles.
description: A group of five glass bottles, some with colorful labels and others plain, featuring smooth, glossy green and brown surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five bottles, with three displaying detailed labels and two plain bottles (one green, one brown) visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the bottles aligned, making only the necks and tops visible, and labels mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the bottles, all labels hidden, highlighting the plain green and brown glass surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the bottles aligned, only the necks and tops visible, and one label partially visible on the edge.
attribute_label_or_branding: Three bottles have visible labels with branding, including gold, red, and white designs and text; two bottles are plain with no visible branding.
